name: laney
description: laney — a pluggable workflow engine for AI-assisted work. Load a workflow (roles, ordered phases, file handoffs, a mechanical judge), then let laney keep its finger on the current step: it runs each phase with whatever tool the workflow names, records every step's output as plain files in a run folder, judges with real commands, and stops after too many fix loops. The engine ships no workflows and has no opinion about which AI tools you use — workflows carry all of that.
